articles.author: Jakob Weizman
articles.title: Survivor, Denmark: Mette Frederiksen clings on — offering lessons for Europe’s left - politico.eu
articles.description: The Danish prime minister suffered a major slump in vote share, but will still be in pole position to lead the next government.
articles.content: Now, fraught coalition talks will begin, with control in Copenhagen likely hinging on which direction Rasmussen the current foreign minister and leader of the Moderates party will swing. His party ha… [+1344 chars]
